prompt: The test incorrectly uses assertEquals for collections. What is the bug?
choices: Collections.sort() does not work on ArrayList
assertSame checks reference equality — expected and actual are different List objects; use assertEquals which calls List.equals() to compare contents
Arrays.asList cannot be compared with ArrayList
assertEquals must be used with int[] not List<Integer>
explanation: assertSame(a,b) is equivalent to assertTrue(a==b) — it checks if they are the same object in memory. expected and actual are distinct objects → fails. Fix: assertEquals(expected, actual) which calls expected.equals(actual) comparing contents element-by-element.
